element.hint: Default radius of scatter plot points in pixels
element.label: Point Size
element.name: point_size

element.hint: Type of regression algorithm for the trend line
element.label: Trend Line - Regression Type
element.name: regression_type

element.hint: Display a best-fit regression trend line through the data
element.label: Show Regression Line
element.name: show_regression

element.hint: Display a trend line through the data points
element.label: Trend Line - Show Trend Line
element.name: show_trend_line

element.hint: Show background grid lines for easier value reading
element.label: Show Grid
element.name: grid_show

element.hint: Opacity of scatter points (0-1, useful for overlapping points)
element.label: Point Opacity
element.name: point_opacity

element.hint: Allow users to zoom and pan the scatter plot
element.label: Enable Zoom
element.name: zoom_enabled

element.hint: Custom label text displayed below the X-axis
element.label: X-Axis Label
element.name: x_axis_label

element.hint: Custom label text displayed beside the Y-axis
element.label: Y-Axis Label
element.name: y_axis_label

element.hint: Shape of data point markers in the scatter plot
element.label: Points - Shape
element.name: point_shape
